title: Campus COOP Archive — Plan Record
description: One record per publicly published higher-education continuity plan. Every record must be traceable to a primary source a skeptic can check. Sibling schema to the Higher Ed EOP Atlas, adapted for continuity (COOP/BCP/academic-continuity/IT-DR).

plan_id.description: Stable kebab-case slug, normally the institution slug; suffixed when an institution has multiple plans (e.g. 'yale-university-bcp', 'yale-university-itdr').

institution_id.description: Kebab-case slug of the institution; joins to institutions.json.

state.description: USPS two-letter code (50 states + DC). Non-US is out of scope.

system_affiliation.description: Parent system/district if any (e.g. 'University System of Georgia', 'California Community Colleges').

enrollment.description: Approximate total enrollment, if readily sourced.

enum: Continuity of Instruction / Academic Continuity Plan

document_type.description: Structural classifier used to segment scores fairly. See taxonomies.md.

framework_alignment.description: Free-text list of frameworks the plan cites/aligns to (e.g. 'FEMA CGC; NIMS; ISO 22301').

recency_year.description: Most recent public version year, if stated.

source_url.description: Direct link to the document (or the plan page for HTML plans) on an official institutional host.

landing_page_url.description: The official page that hosts/links the document.

evidence_quote.description: Verbatim excerpt copied from the document or its official page proving it is what we say it is. NEVER invented.

verification.description: 'opened-and-confirmed' if the document/page was actually rendered and the quote read directly; 'link-only' if the URL resolves on an official host but the bytes were not personally rendered.

date_accessed.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the record was checked.

catalog_notes.description: Short curatorial note (review cycle, approver, scope caveats).

source_lane.description: Which discovery lane / raw file this record came from (provenance).
